DriveBack is a trading name of Mark Leckie t/a MLHoldings · FCA Firm Reference 834008. You do not need a claims management company to make a claim; you can complain to your lender at no cost or refer to the Financial Ombudsman Service at no charge. Average refund figure (~£1,658) is illustrative, based on the FCA’s ~£829 per-agreement estimate. Individual outcomes vary; compensation is not guaranteed; not all consumers are eligible.
